sections.paragraph:
ἀποσυνάγωγος, ον (unknown in nonbibl. lit. and LXX) expelled from the synagogue, excluded, put under a curse/ban (חֵרֶם) ἀ. ποιεῖν exclude fr. the synagogue J 16:2; ἀ. γενέσθαι be excommunicated 9:22; 12:42.—Schürer II 431–33; 462f; Billerb. IV 293–333; JDöller, ZKT 37, 1913, 1–24; KCarroll, BJRL 40, ’57, 19–32.—M-M. TW.

lit. lit. = literal(ly); literature (refererences to [scholarly] literature)

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

  1. fr. = from

Billerb. Billerb. = HLStrack and PBillerbeck, Kommentar z. NT aus Talmud u. Midrasch—List 6

ZKT ZKT = Zeitschrift für katholische Theologie—List 6

BJRL BJRL = Bulletin of the John Rylands Library—List 6

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 123
